name: Garden Scramble
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup red bell pepper, finely chopped
2 slices white or whole wheat bread, toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the egg substitute, pepper and marjoram. Set aside.
2. Spray a nonstick skillet with cooking spray and heat over medium heat.
3. Cook celery, red pepper, green pepper and chives in chicken broth until tender.
4. Add the egg substitute and shredded cheese to the mixture.
5. Stir occasionally until the eggs are set.
6. Serve immediately, topped with toasted bread if desired or plain.
